ideation: This sequence simulates the act of carefully holding a waffle, conveying a sense of delicious anticipation.  The animation will focus on a gentle, deliberate movement of both arms to cradle the imaginary waffle.  The arms will move in a coordinated manner, mirroring each other to emphasize the careful handling of the treat. I'll refer to previous examples to ensure smooth transitions between frames and a natural look. Frame 1: Both arms start in a neutral position at the sides, palms facing inward.  Frame 2: Both arms move upward and slightly inward, mimicking the act of receiving a waffle. The wrists will slightly rotate outward, preparing to cradle the waffle. Frame 3: Both arms gently curve inward, creating a supportive cradle for the waffle. The wrists will tilt slightly downward to enhance the protective gesture. Frame 4: Both arms remain in a gentle cradle, suggesting the waffle is being observed with relish.  The wrists will maintain their downward tilt. Frame 5: The arms slowly return to a neutral position, suggesting the waffle is about to be enjoyed.

frames.beat: arms hang relaxed, waiting for a treat
arms lift to receive the warm waffle
arms gently cradle the delicious waffle
admiring the perfect waffle before the first bite
arms lower, ready to enjoy the waffle
